schema_note: Read-first goals for the Milestone 10 agentic-CI demonstration (docs/agentic-ci-demo.md). Each goal is worked by one Claude Code subagent through the tested MCP tool surface. Mutating tools are deferred until the second-pass ADR amendment, so every goal here is read-only.

goals.summary: List the feed for three communities and report post counts.
goals.done_when: a runner entry named feed-survey reports passed>0 in test-results/summary.json

goals.summary: Resolve the donations flag per community and record its rollout state.
goals.done_when: the rollout state of every surveyed community is recorded

goals.summary: List donations for a community and fetch one by id.
goals.done_when: at least one donation is fetched and validated against the tool output

goals.summary: Before writing any helper, self-check the snippet with the conventions oracle and fix violations.
goals.done_when: the oracle returns ok=true for the agent's final snippet

goals.summary: Poll the gateway rate-limit usage and back off when remaining is low.
goals.done_when: the agent records a back-off decision driven by remaining/reset_in_seconds

goals.summary: Read test-results/summary.json and report which runners failed.
goals.done_when: the agent enumerates every runner with failed>0 (or reports all green)
